title: new ending
wikitext:
[]: new ending             Quote Post by NERV » Sat Jul 09, 2005 3:17 pm Has Gainax or Anno ever thought of making the EOE ending so Shinji doesnt renew the entire world it would be interesting to see an alternate ending to the EOE.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sat Jul 09, 2005 3:24 pm If you listen to some crackpot theories, then that is exactly what happened in the TV show.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jul 09, 2005 3:33 pm I'd say, just keep following the manga for the moment. That's veered wildly enough off from the anime already, and we're still only around ep#23 equivalent. More speculation along those lines in these threads http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=109 http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=651 http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=483
